[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”home” module_id=”home” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/background-trimmed.jpg”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_image alt=”a sketched silhouette of the mysterious and evasive species, the Enlies” title_text=”enlies-concept” admin_label=”blank space” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_image src=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/enlies-concept-e1742440716389.jpg” alt=”a sketched silhouette of the mysterious and evasive species, the Enlies” title_text=”enlies-concept” admin_label=”Enlies” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”Save the Enlies” module_class=”notecard” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Save the Enlies

Enlies are the natural inhabitants of the planet, we should not let them become extinct! We need to rise up against those who want to destroy these intelligent creatures!

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”whatsgoingon” module_id=”whatsgoingon” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”If You’re Wondering What’s Going On…” module_class=”section-heading-a” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

If You’re Wondering What’s Going On…

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”What” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

What

An endangered species akin to wolves are being threatened with extinction.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=”Why” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Why

People don’t know that Enlies are intelligent creatures.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”What we do” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

What we do

SEIAP aims to protect all intelligent beings, no matter the communication barriers.[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=”How you can help” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

How you can help

Donate money to help us secure facilities and rescue these creatures.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”proof” module_id=”proof” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”Proof of Enlies’ Intelligence” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Proof of Enlies’ Intelligence

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_slider _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” hover_enabled=”0″ sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_slide heading=”Experience” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/og-front.jpg” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” sticky_transition=”on”]

A 6 year-old boy had been missing for 5 days when he suddenly was found outside the woods near his home. He was found with only minor injuries, most of which had been healed, and when questioned about his whereabouts, he only said “the big doggies found me. They helped me home.”

When asked to draw a picture, the boy drew this.

[/et_pb_slide][et_pb_slide heading=”Sighting” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/enlies-in-the-woods-e1742440915670.jpg” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” sticky_transition=”on”]

While out for a midnight walk in the woods near her home, an elderly photographer decided to take a few pictures of the night sky.

Little did she know, she caught the first picture of an Enlies in the wild.

We respect her wishes to remain anonymous.

[/et_pb_slide][et_pb_slide heading=”Professional Sketch” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/enlies-professional-sketch.jpg” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” sticky_transition=”on”]

A sketch artist got in touch with a few of the people who have encountered Enlies first-hand. She attempted to sketch the species according to the descriptions she was given.

This is one of her sketches.

[/et_pb_slide][et_pb_slide heading=”Physical Description and History” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” hover_enabled=”0″ sticky_transition=”on” sticky_enabled=”0″]

The most complete description of an Enlies is as follows:

“A very large, wolf-like creature. It has long, hairlike strands of fur coming from the back of it’s head. Length-wise from nose to tail, they are around seven-and-a-half feet long. Their coloring seems to be mostly black fur, with some strange red markings on their foreheads, stringing back over their heads. We do not know where these markings go.”

We do not know much about these creatures due to their reclusive nature, but references to them trace back to even Egyptian times.

[/et_pb_slide][/et_pb_slider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”help” module_id=”help” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_row admin_label=”Row” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_text admin_label=”How Your Donations Can Help” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

How Your Donations Can Help

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_blurb title=”Purchasing Land” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/location.png” alt=”location icon” admin_label=”Purchasing Land” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Your money allows us to build facilities to take care of endangered animals.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_blurb title=”Fight for Protection” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/protection.png” alt=”protection icon” admin_label=”Fight for Protection” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

By providing us with funding, we can drive lawmakers to protect intelligent animal rights.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_blurb title=”Finding Enlies” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/search.png” alt=”search icon” admin_label=”Finding Enlies” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Enlies are large but surprisingly sneaky. With proper funding, we can use new technology to help us track them down.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_blurb title=”Preservation & Healthcare” image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/heal.png” alt=”health icon” admin_label=”Preservation & Healthcare” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Caring for large and misunderstood creatures is hard. We need funding to provide adequate care.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”donate” module_id=”donate” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_image=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/blue-starry-sky-trimmed-with-black-top.jpg”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”Make a Lasting Impression” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

Make a Lasting Impression

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_image=”off”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_text admin_label=”Donation Text” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”]

The Stop Extinction of Intelligent Animals Program (SEIAP or ‘SEE-APP’) tracks, assess, protect and relocate intelligent animals in order to prevent extinction.

We are a nonprofit organization. Your donations help us maintain our facilities and prevent illegal hunting. Donations also help us to research and inform the public about these creatures.

Please consider donating to help save these species who cannot save themselves.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][et_pb_image src=”https://nonprofit.pokealec.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Enlies-call-to-action.jpg” alt=”a bigger version of the Enlies website icon” title_text=”Enlies-call-to-action” admin_label=”Enlies Face” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_button button_text=”Save the Enlies” admin_label=”%22Save the Enlies%22 Button” _builder_version=”4.9.4″ _module_preset=”default”][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
